title: GST/HST rebate – Legal aid plan - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Legal aid plan
Form GST189 – Reason code 5
Reason code 5 provides a rebate of the GST/HST paid on legal services bought for legal aid recipients ( subsection 285(2) of the Excise Tax Act ).
GST/HST Memorandum 13-2 , Rebates – Legal Aid

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
